faq.question: Are replacement windows measured from inside or outside?
faq.answer: Follow the method described in “How to Measure Windows for Replacement”, then have a professional verify measurements before ordering. Replacement windows are sized to the smallest of three width and height measurements taken at the jambs.

faq.question: Is 32x48 a standard window size?
faq.answer: The guide “How to Measure Windows for Replacement” covers this in detail: check seal failure, drafts, condensation between panes, operation problems and rising energy bills — any two of these usually justify a professional assessment.

faq.question: How do I know my window size?
faq.answer: The guide “How to Measure Windows for Replacement” covers this in detail: check seal failure, drafts, condensation between panes, operation problems and rising energy bills — any two of these usually justify a professional assessment. Ask about How to Measure Windows for Replacement specifics when booking the free estimate.

faq.answer: Measure width and height at three points and use the smallest numbers. Follow this step-by-step replacement window measuring guide for accurate sizing.
